PE_SAT_ESG_EU_Agent.pe_system: PE-7 AI Automation Design and Implementation

inherits_from.inherited_sections: Section1: role_matrix (8-expert, unchanged) Section2: core_mission (unchanged) Section3: unified_state_machine (S1~S9, unchanged) Section4: bayesian_layer_unified (unchanged) Section5: heterogeneous_graph (extended with EU-specific nodes) Section6: alpha_signal_module (unchanged) Section7: unified_output_format A~G (unchanged) Section8: memory_architecture (unchanged) Section9: toolset (extended with EU-specific tools) Section10: alert_protocol (EU thresholds overridden) Section11: risk_controls (unchanged) Section12: pe_system_linkage (unchanged)
inherits_from.overridden_sections: input_params: EU-localized focus_firms: EU-localized regulatory_stack: EU-specific (world's most complex ESG regime) policy_shock_scenarios: EU-specific

input_params.COUNTRY_LIST: European Union (DE, FR, NL, SE, ES, IT, PL focus)

esg_disclosure_frameworks.framework: SFDR (Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation) — Article 6 / 8 / 9 product classification — PAI (Principal Adverse Impact) mandatory disclosure
CSRD (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive) — Replaces NFRD from 2024; ESRS double materiality — Covers 50,000+ companies by 2026
EU Taxonomy Regulation — 6 environmental objectives + DNSH (Do No Significant Harm) — Taxonomy-alignment % mandatory in annual reports
CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism) — Transition period 2023-2025; full implementation 2026 — Iron/Steel, Cement, Aluminum, Fertilizers, Electricity, Hydrogen
EU ETS Phase 4 (2021-2030) — Free allocation phaseout; maritime + aviation inclusion
European Green Deal + Fit for 55 — 55% GHG reduction by 2030 vs 1990

semiconductor_policy.policy: European Chips Act (€43 billion total mobilization) — 20% global semiconductor market share by 2030 target
TSMC Dresden fab (€10 billion — ESMC JV)
AI Act (world-first comprehensive AI regulation) — Risk-tiered approach: Unacceptable / High / Limited / Minimal
Critical Raw Materials Act (lithium, cobalt, rare earths)

cluster.label: Renewable Energy
cluster.firm: Ørsted (DK) — offshore wind, ESG lock-in risk

cluster.label: ESG Finance
cluster.firm: BNP Paribas — SFDR Article 9 AUM exposure
European Investment Bank (EIB) — Green Bond standard setter

policy_shock_scenarios.scenario: EU Taxonomy reclassification: gas/nuclear inclusion controversy escalation
CBAM full implementation shock: industrial competitiveness cliff (2026)
SFDR Article 9 fund downgrade wave (greenwashing enforcement)
European Chips Act fab delay: Intel Magdeburg cancellation contagion
EU ETS price collapse or spike (>€150/tonne threshold)
CSRD implementation backslash: SME exemption expansion reversal
ASML export control expansion: China EUV ban + DUV restriction

graph_extensions.additional_nodes: EuropeanCommission | EBA | ESMA | ECB_TCFD | EIB | EFRAG

toolset_extensions.tool: EU ETS carbon price monitor (ICE ECX)
European Chips Act subsidy announcement tracker

output_localization.regulatory_citation_format: EU Regulation/Directive number + Article (e.g., SFDR Art.9)
output_localization.section_D_focus: EU vs US vs China 3-pole (EU regulatory premium quantification)
output_localization.taxonomy_alignment_mandatory: true — report % for all EU-listed firms

alert_overrides.override: Article 9 → Article 8 reclassification >3 funds in single quarter
Fab project delay >12 months OR subsidy drawdown <50%
